Describe the sequence of visual elements appearing and disappearing throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the academic paper layout with title and authors appears on screen; at 6s, a yellow highlight box emphasizes specific text in the abstract; at 12s, a cross-section of biological tissue with dark cysts appears on the right; at 16s, the content disappears briefly; at 18s, the specimen and text reappear together.

question: Describe the specific visual changes regarding the document text and the pathology image.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the document title and author names appear in black font; at 6s, a yellow highlight box surrounds the epilepsy statement; at 12s, a pale fleshy mass with dark cyst-like cavities appears on the right; at 16s, the screen clears completely of all text and images; at 18s, the document and pathology image reappear together.
